British Gastropub

The Windmill

★ 4.4 (1,842)
££ Clapham

A Clapham institution beloved by local families, with a kids menu, beer garden, and staff who actually mean it when they say child-friendly.

Why Kid Friendly London is different

Every other list tells you a restaurant is "family-friendly." We tell you why — and exactly what to expect.

  • ✅ Kids menu: yes/no/likely — not just "child-friendly"
  • 🛻 Buggy accessibility — because this matters enormously
  • 🪑 Highchair availability — confirmed, not assumed
  • 🔊 Noise level — quiet, moderate, or lively
  • 👶 Best for age range — babies through to teens
  • 🚿 Baby changing — because you need to know

"Finally a restaurant guide that tells me if I can park my double buggy. This is the only one I use now."

— Emma, mum of two, Clapham
